- 

## Verification

- [ ] `python -m pytest tests/ -v`
- [ ] README or public docs updated when user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] Generated output snapshots updated when generated files changed

## Checklist

- [ ] Change is focused and reviewable
- [ ] Tests were added or updated for behavior changes
- [ ] Local-only files are not staged: `.claude/`, `.codex/`, `.agy/`, `docs/`
- [ ] Security-sensitive details, secrets, tokens, and local session data are not committed
